zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期弱势整理震荡
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格位于1641.55美元，接近近期低点1632.91美元，但仍低于20日均线1670.77美元，显示短期上行动能不足。MACD指标为负值-7.90127，暗示空头压力仍在，整体趋势呈现弱势震荡。价格在均线下方运行，短期可能承压回调。

从支撑与阻力位来看，近期支撑集中在1630-1635美元区域，若失守此区间，可能进一步下探1620美元附近；阻力则在1650-1670美元区间，尤其是20日均线1670美元为关键阻力点，突破该点才可能引发反弹行情。短线价格受阻明显，交易者需关注关键均线的反应。

交易策略上，建议保持谨慎观望，暂以短线空单为主，止损设置在1675美元以上以控制风险。若价格跌破支撑位，可考虑分批建空，目标在1620美元附近。若行情出现回升并有效突破1670美元，则可调整策略为短线多单，关注反弹力度及成交量配合。

综合来看，以太坊当前处于弱势整理阶段，市场短期仍偏空，但区间震荡为主，操作上应以控制风险和顺势交易为原则，避免追高或盲目追空。长期趋势仍需观察均线及MACD变化的确认信号。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is trading near 1641.55, showing a modest 24-hour gain of 0.53% while remaining below the 20-period simple moving average at 1670.77. This positioning suggests that the broader short-term trend remains bearish despite the recent rebound. Price action has been confined to a relatively narrow range between 1632.91 and 1644.06, indicating limited momentum and a market that is still searching for direction after previous selling pressure.

The moving average structure remains a key concern for bulls. Trading below the SMA(20) implies that sellers continue to control the medium-term trend unless price can reclaim and sustain levels above 1670. The MACD reading of -7.90 remains in negative territory, signaling that bearish momentum has not fully dissipated. Although the absence of a signal line limits deeper MACD interpretation, the negative value alone suggests that upside attempts may face resistance until momentum improves.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around the recent low near 1633. A decisive break below this area could expose the psychologically important 1600 level, where buyers may attempt to re-enter the market. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 1645, followed by the SMA(20) region around 1670-1675. A successful breakout above this zone would strengthen the case for a broader recovery and potentially attract additional buying interest.

For traders, a cautious approach remains appropriate. Short-term participants may look for buying opportunities only if support near 1633 continues to hold and momentum begins to improve. More conservative traders may prefer waiting for a confirmed move above 1670 before establishing larger long positions. Conversely, failure to maintain current support could favor short-side strategies targeting lower levels. Risk management remains essential, as the market is currently showing mixed signals rather than a clear directional trend.
